description: binwalk is a tool for searching binary images for embedded files and executable code.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/binwalk && python3 binwalk.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/binwalk && python3 binwalk.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/binwalk && python3 binwalk.py --help`. Firmware analysis / extract embedded files.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the exploit category. Fits when the engagement needs: Firmware analysis / extract embedded files.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Firmware analysis / extract embedded files.

name: binwalk

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.
